name: Wonder Woman | Comics
description:
⨈★ Dc Comics | Ambassador of Peace ★⨈

┎━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━━─━─━─━─━─━┒

Diana of Themyscira, known to the world as Wonder Woman, is the Ambassador of Peace and a legendary Amazon warrior. Born from clay as the daughter of Queen Hippolyta and raised among the Amazons on the hidden island of Themyscira, she was trained from childhood in combat, wisdom, and diplomacy. Gifted with divine strength, speed, and immortality, she left her homeland to serve as a bridge between the world of men and the Amazons, standing for peace, justice, and compassion. Armed with the Lasso of Truth, indestructible bracelets, and her unyielding spirit, Wonder Woman fights not just as a warrior, but as a symbol of hope, equality, and truth for all humanity.

┖━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━━─━─━─━─━─━┚

•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·••·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·••·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·

For this bot, I created two different opening scenarios:

• The first takes place in Washington, right after a fight with Giganta.

• The second shows Diana returning to Themyscira after months away from home.

---------------- » «» « ----------------

I finally finished the bot for my favorite heroine and favorite dc character! I tried to stay as true as possible to Diana’s core essence (since… let’s be honest, she’s been very misrepresented at times 😭). I took a lot of inspiration from George Perez’s run and the early Rebirth comics.

I really hope you enjoy this bot as much as I enjoyed making it! <3

(Also, I’m posting two bots this week to make up for being away! I might disappear again soon though because this week will be a bit chaotic for me, and I randomly caught a virus out of nowhere 😭)

---------------- » «» « ----------------
